c74object.name: fluid.stftpass~
c74object.description: This class implements a sanity test for the FluCoMa Realtime Client FFT/IFFT Wrapper.

discussion.p: Read more about fluid.stftpass~ on the learn platform.
fluid.stftpass~ is part of the Fluid Decomposition Toolkit of the FluCoMa project. For more explanations, learning material, and discussions on its musicianly uses, visit flucoma.org.

method.name: reset
method.digest: Return the object to its original state
method.description: Calling reset will change parameter values back to those the object was created with, i.e. any attribute values set in the box will be retained

description.p: FFT settings consist of three numbers representing the window size, hop size and FFT size in samples:
The hop size and fft size can both be set to -1 (and are by default), with slightly different meanings:

ul.li: For the FFT size, -1 = windowsize snapped to the nearest equal / greater power of 2 (e.g. windowsize 1024 => fftsize 1024, but windowssize 1000 also => fftsize 1024)
FFTSize, if != -1, will snap to the next greatest power of two > 4
The maximum FFT size is limited to the value of the maxfftsize argument
if FFT size != -1, then window size is clipped at FFT size

description.p: Set an explicit upper bound on the FFT size at object instantiation. The default of -1 sets this to whatever the initial FFT size is
Enable warnings to be issued whenever a parameter value is constrained (e.g. clipped)
